62edb4fedff988263841ba9e.question: Shortly after taking power, this ruler defeated the Shardana sea pirates, many of whom joined in this man’s personal bodyguard. This man memorialized the conquest of Nubia in the walls of the Beit el-Wali temple complex. He secured food aid for the people with whom he signed the first recorded peace treaty in history, and he led troops for his father Seti I. He celebrated the Sed Festival to mark the 30th year of his 66-year reign and ordered great building projects like the tomb of his consort Nefertari and the temple complex of Abu Simbel. This pharaoh also fought Muwatallis and the Hittites at the Battle of Kadesh. For 10 points, name this New Kingdom pharaoh.
62edb4fedff988263841ba9e.question_sanitized: Shortly after taking power, this ruler defeated the Shardana sea pirates, many of whom joined in this man's personal bodyguard. This man memorialized the conquest of Nubia in the walls of the Beit el-Wali temple complex. He secured food aid for the people with whom he signed the first recorded peace treaty in history, and he led troops for his father Seti I. He celebrated the Sed Festival to mark the 30th year of his 66-year reign and ordered great building projects like the tomb of his consort Nefertari and the temple complex of Abu Simbel. This pharaoh also fought Muwatallis and the Hittites at the Battle of Kadesh. For 10 points, name this New Kingdom pharaoh.
62edb4fedff988263841ba9e.answer: Ramses II [Accept Ramses the Great or Ramesses II. Prompt on “Ramses.”]
62edb4fedff988263841ba9e.answer_sanitized: Ramses II [Accept Ramses the Great or Ramesses II. Prompt on "Ramses."]
